title: Viguiera superaxillaris
taxonomy: Viguiera superaxillaris is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Mexico, and its classification can be broken down into its higher taxonomic ranks. At the kingdom level, it belongs to Plantae, and at the phylum level, it is classified as Magnoliophyta. The class to which it belongs is Magnoliopsida, and its order is Asterales.
